revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 2 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 2 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月2日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[12月13日]]） - 秋田県・岩崎県・本荘県・亀田県・矢島県が合併して[[秋田県]]に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦1871年12月13日） - 仙台県・石巻県・角田県が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[正応]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1288年]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1714年]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1813年]][[11月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月1日 (旧暦)|11月1日]] 翌日[[11月3日 (旧暦)|11月3日]] - 前月[[10月2日 (旧暦)|10月2日]] 翌月[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] *新暦[[11月2日]]
{{stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[正応]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1288年]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1714年]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1813年]][[11月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[正応]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1288年]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339年]]） * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[12月9日]]） - [[樺山資紀]]、[[薩摩藩]]士･[[政治家]]（+ [[1922年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月19日]]） - [[伊東里き]]、[[日本人]]の[[北アメリカ]]への[[移住]]に尽力した女性（+ [[1950年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967年]]） * 西暦[[1941年]]（グレゴリオ暦1941年[[12月19日]]） - [[李明博]]、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1714年]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年(閏)（グレゴリオ暦[[1813年]][[12月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740年]]） * [[文政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1821年]][[11月26日]]） - [[木下幸文]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1779年]]）

[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[明治]]4年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1871]][[12月13日]]） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]]・[[岩崎県]]・[[本荘県]]・[[亀田県]]・[[矢島県]]が合併して[[秋田県]]に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]]・[[石巻県]]・[[角田県]]が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]]の県域が確定
== Births == * [[正応]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1288]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339]]） * [[天保]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1837]][[12月9日]]） - [[樺山資紀]]、[[薩摩藩]]士･[[政治家]]（+ [[1922]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1865]][[12月19日]]） - [[伊東里き]]、[[日本人]]の[[北アメリカ]]への[[移住]]に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967]]） * 西暦[[1941]]（グレゴリオ暦1941年[[12月19日]]） - [[李明博]]、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1557]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1714]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年(閏)（グレゴリオ暦[[1813]][[12月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740]]） * [[文政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1821]][[11月26日]]） - [[木下幸文]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1779]]）

[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[明治]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1871]][[12月13日]]） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]]・[[岩崎県]]・[[本荘県]]・[[亀田県]]・[[矢島県]]が合併して[[秋田県]]に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year（グレゴリオ暦1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]]・[[石巻県]]・[[角田県]]が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]]の県域が確定
== Births == * [[正応]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1288]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339]]） * [[天保]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1837]][[12月9日]]） - [[樺山資紀]]、[[薩摩藩]]士･[[政治家]]（+ [[1922]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1865]][[12月19日]]） - [[伊東里き]]、[[日本人]]の[[北アメリカ]]への[[移住]]に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]]） * [[明治]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967]]） * 西暦[[1941]]（グレゴリオ暦1941年[[12月19日]]） - [[李明博]]、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1557]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1714]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年(閏)（グレゴリオ暦[[1813]][[12月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740]]） * [[文政]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1821]][[11月26日]]） - [[木下幸文]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1779]]）

revision.comment: attempting a full on mass replacement of all the era names
revision.text:
[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1871]][[12月13日]]） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]]・[[岩崎県]]・[[本荘県]]・[[亀田県]]・[[矢島県]]が合併して[[秋田県]]に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]]・[[石巻県]]・[[角田県]]が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]]の県域が確定
== Births == * [[正応]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1288]][[11月26日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]、96代[[天皇]]（+ [[1339]]） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1837]][[12月9日]]） - [[樺山資紀]]、[[薩摩藩]]士･[[政治家]]（+ [[1922]]） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1865]][[12月19日]]） - [[伊東里き]]、[[日本人]]の[[北アメリカ]]への[[移住]]に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1872]][[12月2日]]） - [[武島羽衣]]、[[国文学]]者（+ [[1967]]） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1941年[[12月19日]]） - [[李明博]]、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1557]][[11月22日]]） - [[織田信行]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1714]][[12月8日]]） - [[柳沢吉保]]、[[江戸幕府]][[老中]]（* [[1658]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]10年(閏) ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1813]][[12月24日]]） - [[後桜町天皇]]、117代[[天皇]]（* [[1740]]） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1821]][[11月26日]]） - [[木下幸文]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1779]]）

[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[12月13日]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[正応]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[天皇]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[12月9日]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[薩摩藩]] 士･[[政治家]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[12月19日]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[12月2日]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[12月19日]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[11月22日]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、[[武将]] ・[[織田信長]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[12月8日]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[江戸幕府]] [[老中]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[12月24日]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[天皇]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1779]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[正応]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[天皇]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[薩摩藩]] 士･[[政治家]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、[[武将]] ・[[織田信長]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[江戸幕府]] [[老中]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[天皇]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1779]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[November 2 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[天皇]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[薩摩藩]] 士･[[政治家]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、[[武将]] ・[[織田信長]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[江戸幕府]] [[老中]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[天皇]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1779]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|1|11|3|10|2|12|11|1102}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[天皇]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[薩摩藩]] 士･[[政治家]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、[[武将]] ・[[織田信長]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[江戸幕府]] [[老中]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[天皇]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1779]] ）

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[織田信長]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871年12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941年[[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10年(閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871st year 12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941st year [[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10th year (閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871st year 12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941st year [[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10th year (閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871st year 12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941st year [[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10th year (閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|1|11|3|10|2|12|11|1102}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871st year 12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941st year [[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10th year (閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|1|11|3|10|2|12|11|1102}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 13]] ） - [[久保田藩|秋田県]] ・[[岩崎県]] ・[[本荘県]] ・[[亀田県]] ・[[矢島県]] が合併して[[秋田県]] に。秋田県の現在の県域が確定 * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1871st year 12月13日） - [[仙台県]] ・[[石巻県]] ・[[角田県]] が合併して仙台県に。現在の[[宮城県]] の県域が確定
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[November 26]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] 、96代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1339]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[December 9]] ） - [[樺山資紀]] 、[[Satsuma Domain]] 士･[[politician]] （+ [[1922]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[December 19]] ） - [[伊東里き]] 、[[日本人]] の[[北アメリカ]] への[[移住]] に尽力した女性（+ [[1950]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 2]] ） - [[武島羽衣]] 、[[国文学]] 者（+ [[1967]] ） * 西暦[[1941]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1941st year [[December 19]] ） - [[李明博]] 、第17代[[大統領 (大韓民国)|大韓民国大統領]]
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1557]] [[November 22]] ） - [[織田信行]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の弟 * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1714]] [[December 8]] ） - [[柳沢吉保]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Rōjū]] （* [[1658]] ） * [[Bunka]] 10th year (閏) ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[December 24]] ） - [[後桜町天皇]] 、117代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1740]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1821]] [[November 26]] ） - [[木下幸文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1779]] ）

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] [[zh:十一月初二]] [[en:draft:November 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|1|11|3|10|2|12|11|1102}}

[[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).
== See Also ==

{{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. == Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[1779]]).
== See Also ==

[[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.

[[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.

{{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1872|1872]] [[December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[:en:1941|1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[:en:1557|1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1714|1714]] [[December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1658|1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1813|1813]] [[December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1740|1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1821|1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[:en:1779|1779]]).
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[:en:宮城県|宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:December 9|December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[:en:1950|1950]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[:en:1967|1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[:en:1941|1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[:en:1557|1557]] [[November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1658|1658]]). * [[Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1813|1813]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1740|1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1821|1821]] [[November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[:en:1779|1779]]).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|1|11|3|10|2|12|11|1102|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840081]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. == Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[:en:秋田県|秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[:en:宮城県|宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:December 9|December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[:en:1950|1950]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[:en:1967|1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[:en:1941|1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1658|1658]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1813|1813]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1740|1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[:en:1779|1779]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初二]][[zh:十一月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840081]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 2|qq=November 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[:en:秋田県|秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[:en:宮城県|宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:December 9|December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[:en:1950|1950]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[:en:1967|1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[:en:1941|1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1658|1658]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1813|1813]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1740|1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[:en:1779|1779]]).
== See Also ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[:en:秋田県|秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 13|December 13]]), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[:en:宮城県|宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year (Julian calendar [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. [[:en:1339|1339]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:December 9|December 9]]) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. [[:en:1922|1922]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 19|December 19]]) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. [[:en:1950|1950]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. [[:en:1967|1967]]). * In the Gregorian year [[:en:1941|1941]] (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year (Julian calendar [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1658|1658]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1813|1813]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1740|1740]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born [[:en:1779|1779]]).

== Births == * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1327371|lt=Shōō}} 1st year (Julian calendar {{ill|1288|en|1288|WD=Q5550|lt=1288}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1339|en|1339|WD=Q6051|lt=1339}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} {{ill|December 9|en|December 9|WD=Q2304|lt=December 9}}) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|WD=Q2165|lt=1922}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 19|en|December 19|WD=Q2451|lt=December 19}}) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 5th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}}) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. {{ill|1967|en|1967|WD=Q2648|lt=1967}}). * In the Gregorian year {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941}} (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13}}), the territories of Akita Prefecture were established through the merger of [[久保田藩|Kubota Domain]] (labeled as Akita), Iwasaki, Honjō, Kameda, and Yajima into [[:en:秋田県|秋田県]]. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 13|en|December 13|WD=Q2379|lt=December 13}}), Sendai, Ishinomaki, and Kakuda were merged to form Sendai Prefecture, establishing the current boundaries of [[:en:宮城県|宮城県]] (Miyagi Prefecture).
== Births == * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1327371|lt=Shōō}} 1st year (Julian calendar {{ill|1288|en|1288|WD=Q5550|lt=1288}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1339|en|1339|WD=Q6051|lt=1339}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} {{ill|December 9|en|December 9|WD=Q2304|lt=December 9}}) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|WD=Q2165|lt=1922}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 19|en|December 19|WD=Q2451|lt=December 19}}) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 5th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2}}) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. {{ill|1967|en|1967|WD=Q2648|lt=1967}}). * In the Gregorian year {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941}} (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 3rd year (Julian calendar {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22}}) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1813|en|1813|WD=Q6937|lt=1813}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}}) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1740|en|1740|WD=Q7006|lt=1740}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1821|en|1821|WD=Q6976|lt=1821}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born {{ill|1779|en|1779|WD=Q7714|lt=1779}}).

== Births == * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1327371|lt=Shōō|1=Shōō (Kamakura period)}} 1st year (Julian calendar {{ill|1288|en|1288|WD=Q5550|lt=1288|1=1288}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}) – Emperor Go-Daigo, the 96th Emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1339|en|1339|WD=Q6051|lt=1339|1=1339}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|December 9|en|December 9|WD=Q2304|lt=December 9|1=December 9}}) – Kabayama Sashinori, a Satsuma Domain samurai and politician (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|WD=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|December 19|en|December 19|WD=Q2451|lt=December 19|1=December 19}}) – Itō Satoki, a Japanese woman who contributed to emigration to North America (d. {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 5th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|December 2|en|December 2|WD=Q2296|lt=December 2|1=December 2}}) – Takejima Hagoromo, a scholar of national literature (d. {{ill|1967|en|1967|WD=Q2648|lt=1967|1=1967}}). * In the Gregorian year {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941|1=1941}} (December 19), Lee Myung-bak, the 17th President of the Republic of Korea, was born.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 3rd year (Julian calendar {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22|1=November 22}}) – Oda Nobuyuki, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) and the younger brother of Oda Nobunaga. * [[正徳 (日本)|Shōtoku]] 4th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}) – Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 10th year (leap month) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1813|en|1813|WD=Q6937|lt=1813|1=1813}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – Emperor Go-Sakuramachi, the 117th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1740|en|1740|WD=Q7006|lt=1740|1=1740}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 4th year (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1821|en|1821|WD=Q6976|lt=1821|1=1821}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}) – Kinoshita Yukifumi, a waka poet (born {{ill|1779|en|1779|WD=Q7714|lt=1779|1=1779}}).
== See Also ==
